description_long: This is a thick, rectangular hardcover book with a dark, nearly black cover and visible silver-gray page edges. The cover features Chinese characters printed in a bold, clear font, and the book includes two thin ribbon bookmarks extending from the bottom. The spine is also marked with Chinese text, matching the style of the front cover. The book's pages are tightly bound, and the edges appear slightly textured, suggesting a high-quality print. The overall appearance is formal and elegant, suitable for a significant literary or religious work. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the cover aside from the text.
description: A thick, dark hardcover book with Chinese text on the cover and spine, featuring silver-gray page edges and ribbon bookmarks.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the bottom edge, showing the silver-gray page edges, two ribbon bookmarks, and the Chinese text on the cover.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from above, highlighting the flat, dark cover with Chinese text and the uniform, metallic-looking page edges.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the top edge, displaying the page edges and the cover text, with no bookmarks visible.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the spine, showing the vertical Chinese text and simple line decorations, as well as the ribbon bookmarks extending from the bottom.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with horizontal lines at the top and bottom, and features vertically oriented Chinese text in a simple, clear font. There are no decorative elements or illustrations.
